===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''===
Kofu first appeared in silhouette alongside the other [[Gym Leader]]s of [[Paldea]] in ''[[HZ046|Welcome to Naranja Academy!]]'' during [[Clavell]]'s explanation of how [[Tera Training]] works.

Kofu appeared in ''[[HZ055|Showdown! The Paldea Elite Four]]'', where he was partnered with [[Coral]] as part of the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]], where they went up against [[Larry]]. The battle ended when Coral had her {{p|Glalie}} used {{m|Self-Destruct}}, knocking out all of the Pokémon and resulting in her and Kofu's loss.

====Character====
Kofu has a cheerful personality, being able to take a loss with a happy laugh.
